subject: FW: Cannes/India
body:
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 
 

________________________________

From: Peggy Siegal [mailto:Peggy@peggysiegal.com] 
Sent: Sunday, May 04, 2008 12:29 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Cannes/India



Lesley- can I speak to Jeffrey or get word to him?
.
Jeffrey said he will send me to the film festival May 16th to May
26th....for work.
I have checked on the hotel rooms (The Majestic) and for the least
expensive  charge triple with a 12 night minimum stay which come to
about $17,000 for room, $1,000 for food and $2,000 for tax...so that's
$20,000
(Remember the dollar is very weak)
The business class AA plane ticket is $8,500.
So we are talking about $28,500 for my 10 day stay.
This is more expensive than I thought it would be-
And if Jeffrey thinks this is too much money to spend- I completely
agree....let me know what he wants to do

He has also agreed to send me on another xmas trip...(Last ones were
Africa and Egypt and were life changeing). This year we talked about
India...I don't want to jeopardize my xmas trip....

Let me know what he says....he knows I am forever grateful for
everything he does for me...and remain his loyal friend with or without
the trips...
xoxo Peggy
